item.title: Pali Lesson 17 Locative Case
item.content:encoded:
• Pali: Lesson 17 Locative Case
    • Locative Singular forms
    • Locative Plural forms
    • Vocabulary
      • Nouns
      • Indeclinables
      • Adjectives
      • Verbs
    • Exercises
      • (a) Translate into English:

Pali: Lesson 17 Locative Case

Locative Singular forms

Stem 词干 Locative Singular forms 位格单数 Meaning 含义
Buddha Buddhe, Buddhasmiṃ, Buddhamhi Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉醒的人
muni munismiṃ, munimhi monk; sage; seer; hermit; silent sage 僧人；哲人，智者；隐士
senānī senānismiṃ, senānimhi general 将军
garu garusmiṃ, garumhi teacher; guru; esteemed person 老师；大师；受敬重的人
vidu vidusmiṃ, vidumhi wise man; seer 智者
go gavasmiṃ, gāvasmiṃ, gavamhi, gāvamhi cow; cattle 母牛；牛

Locative Plural forms

Stem 词干 Locative Plural forms 位格复数 Meaning 含义
Buddha Buddhesu Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉醒的人
muni munisu, munīsu monk; sage; seer; hermit; silent sage 僧人；哲人，智者；隐士
senānī senānīsu general 将军
garu garusu, garūsu teacher; guru; esteemed person 老师；大师；受敬重的人
vidū vidūsu wise man; seer 智者

Vocabulary

词汇

Nouns

名词

Pāḷi English 中文
deva god, rain 天神；雨
ratha chariot, carriage （古代用于战斗或比赛的）双轮敞篷马车；(旧时载客的）四轮马车
giri rock, mountain 石山；高山，山岳
sissa student 学生
sakuṇa bird 鸟
kalaha quarrel 争吵
vijjālaya college 学院，大学
mañca bed 床
kapi, vānara monkey, ape 猴子；类人猿
geṇḍuka, kanduka ball 球

Indeclinables

无屈哲变化词

Indeclinables: (of a noun, pronoun, or adjective in a highly inflected language) having no inflections.
(在一个高度屈折变化的语言中，名词、代词或形容词）无屈哲变化

inflection: a change in the form of a word, especially the ending, according to its grammatical function in a sentence（尤指词尾的）屈折变化

Pāḷi English 中文
pāto morning 早晨
pāto'va (pāto + eva) early morning 清晨
sāyaṃ evening 晚上，傍晚
divā at day time, noon 白天, 中午
bahi outside, out 外部的, 外面
tatra tatra here and there 这里和那里

Adjectives

形容词

Pāḷi English 中文
dhammika righteous 公正的；正直的；正当的
seṭṭha best, highest 最好的

Verbs

Pāḷi English 中文 pp. (past participle 过去分词)
pabbajati goes forth, enters a reigious order 达上成为一名比库 pabbajita
calati moves 移动 calita
pasīdati is pleased, is delighted in 高兴 pasanna
ramati is pleased, is delighted in 高兴 rata
vassati rains, rain falls vuṭṭha
vijjhati shoots 射击 viddha
māpeti builds 建筑，建造 māpita
upapajjati is born in, reaches 出生，达到 upapanna
uppajjati is born 出生 uppanna

Exercises

练习

(a) Translate into English:

翻译成英文

1.Ahaṃ hiyyo bhātikassa gehe vasitvā ajja pāto’va idhāgacchiṃ.
1.I, having stayed in my brother’s house yesterday, came here early morning today.
1.我昨天住在哥哥家，今天一早就来到了这里。

Pāḷi English 中文
Ahaṃ me 我
hiyyo yesterday 昨天
bhātikassa brother 兄弟
gehe house; dwelling 房子；住处
vasitvā having lived; having stayed; having remained 住在；留在
ajja today, now 今天；现在
pāto’va early morning 清早
idhāgacchiṃ ? ?

2.Idāni thero vihārasmiṃ dhammaṃ deseti, kiṃ tumhe dhammaṃ sotuṃ tahiṃ na gacchatha?
2.The Elder (monk) expounds the Dhamma now in the monastery. Don’t you go there to listen to the Dhamma?
2.长老（和尚）现于寺院说法。 你不去那里听法吗？
dhammaṃ

Pāḷi English 中文
Idāni now; soon; at present 现在
thero (vinaya) elder; senior monk; monk with ten or more years as a monk 长老
vihārasmiṃ monastery 寺院
dhammaṃ Buddha's teachings 佛法
deseti preach (to); teaches (to); explains (to) 教导, 解释
kiṃ ？ ？
tumhe you all; you (royal plural) 你们
dhammaṃ Buddha's teachings 佛法
sotuṃ to hear 听
tahiṃ there; in that place 那里，在那个地方

3.Girisu tatra tatra ahāyo vicaranti.
3. Snakes move about on mountains here and there.
3.蛇在山上到处乱跑。

Pāḷi English 中文
Girisu mountain 高山，山丘
tatra tatra here and there 这里和那里
ahāyo ? ?
vicaranti moves about (in); wanders about (in); roams (in) 四处走动（在）

4.Idāni devo vassati, mā bahi gacchatha.
4.Now rain falls (now it rains), (so) don’t go out.
4.现在下雨了，所以不要出去了。

Pāḷi English 中文
Idāni now, here, at present 现在
devo deity, god 天
vassati rains 下雨
mā do not; may one not; don’t let 不要
bahi externally; outside; outwardly 外面
gacchatha goes; walks; moves; wanders around 去

5.Ajja bahū manussā gāme sannipatiṃsu.
5.Today many men were assembled in the village.
5.今天村里聚集了许多人。

Pāḷi English 中文
Ajja today 今天
bahū many 许多
manussā human being; man; person 人
gāme village 村庄
sannipatiṃsu gathered together 聚集在一起

6.Maggesu rathā calanti.
6.Chariots (cars) move in roads.
6.马车(车)在道路上行驶。

Pāḷi English 中文
Maggesu road; path; track; way 道路
rathā chariot; coach; carriage 马车；车
calanti shakes; wavers; is agitated; is unstable 摇动

7.Viduno Buddhe pasannā.
7.The wise are delighted in the Buddha (pleased with the Buddha).
7.智者对佛陀欢喜。

Pāḷi English 中文
Viduno wise man; seer 智者
Buddhe Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉悟者
pasannā pleased (with); full of faith (in); devoted (to); 对...欢喜

8.Bahū manussā dhamme pasannā dhammaṃ caritvā saggesu uppannā ahesuṃ.
8.Many men delighted in the Dhamma, practiced virtues and were born in heavenly abodes.
许多人对佛法欢喜，修习美德并在天界投生。

Pāḷi English 中文
Bahū many 许多
manussā human being; man; person 人
dhamme the teachings of the Buddha 佛法
pasannā pleased (with); full of faith (in); devoted (to) 对...欢喜
dhammaṃ the teachings of the Buddha 佛法
caritvā having walked; having wandered
saggesu heaven; paradise 天界
uppannā born (in) 出生（在）
ahesuṃ there were; they were

9.Sissā ārāme sannipatitvā kandukehi kīḷiṃsu.
9.Students (pupils) got together in the park and played with balls.
9.学生聚在公园里玩球。

Pāḷi English 中文
Sissā pupil; student 学生
ārāme park; parkland; nature reserve 公园
sannipatitvā having gathered together; having assembled; having met; 聚在一起
kandukehi ball (used in games) ball (used in games) 球（用于游戏中）
kīḷiṃsu played; had fun 玩

10.Gahapatino kumārā vijjālayamhā āgantvā bhutvā idāni mañcesu sayanti.
10.The children of the householder returned from the school, took meal and now are lying on beds.
10.户主的孩子们从学校回来，吃过饭，现在躺在床上。

Pāḷi English 中文
Gahapatino householder 屋主
kumārā youngster; young boy 少年，小男孩
vijjālayamhā
āgantvā having arrived; having come to; having returned 已到达；已来到；已回来
bhutvā having eaten 已吃过
idāni now; soon; at present 现在
mañcesu bed 床
sayanti lies down; rests; sleeps 躺下；休息；睡

item.title: Abhidhamma 89citta 阿毗达摩89心
item.content:encoded:
graph LR
Abhidhamma --> 89心[<b>Citta - 89</b><br>consciousnes - 89<br>心 - 89]


89心 --> 81世间心[<b>Lokiyacitta - 81<b><br>mundane consciousness - 81<br>世间心 - 81]
 
89心 --> 8出世间心[<b>Lokuttaracittāni - 8</b>  <br>supramundane  consciousness - 8<br>出世间心 - 8]


81世间心 --> 54欲界心[<b>kāmāvacaracittāni - 54</b><br>sense-sphere consciousness - 54<br>欲界心 - 54]
 
81世间心 --> 15色界心[<b>rūpāvacaracittāni - 15</b><br>fine-material-sphere consciousness - 15<br>色界心 - 15]

81世间心 --> 12无色界心[<b>arūpāvacaracittāni - 12</b><br>immaterial-sphere consciousness - 12<br>无色界心 - 12]


54欲界心 --> 24欲界美心[<b>kāmāvacara-sobhanacittāni - 24</b><br>sense-sphere beautiful consciousness - 24<br>欲界美心 - 24]
 
54欲界心 --> 18无因心[<b>ahetukacittāni - 18 </b><br>rootless consciousness - 18<br>无因心 - 18]
 
54欲界心 --> 12不善心[<b>akusalacittāni - 12</b><br>unwholesome consciousness - 12<br>不善心 - 12]


24欲界美心 --> 8欲界善心[<b>kāmāvacara-kusalacittāni - 8</b><br>sense-sphere wholesome consciousness - 8<br>欲界善心 - 8]

24欲界美心 --> 8欲界果报心[<b>kāmāvacara-vipākacittāni - 8</b><br>sense-sphere resultant consciousness - 8<br>欲界果报心 - 8]

24欲界美心 --> 8欲界唯作心[<b>kāmāvacara-kriyācittāni - 8</b><br>sense-sphere functional consciousness - 8<br>欲界唯作心 - 8]


8欲界善心 --> 1.悦俱智相应无行一心[<b>1.Somanassasahagataṃ ñāṇasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>1.One consiousness,accompanied by joy, associated with knowledge, unprompted<br>1.悦俱智相应无行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 2.悦俱智相应有行一心[<b>2.Somanassasahagataṃ ñāṇasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.</b><br>2.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with knowledge, prompted<br>2.悦俱智相应有行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 3.悦俱智不相应无行一心[<b>3.Somanassasahagataṃ ñāṇavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>3.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, dissociated from knowledge, unprompted<br>3.悦俱智不相应无行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 4.悦俱智不相应有行一心[<b>4.Somanassasahagataṃ ñāṇavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>4.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with knowledge, prompted<br>4.悦俱智不相应有行一心]


8欲界善心 --> 5.舍俱智相应无行一心[<b>5.Upekkhāsahagataṃ ñāṇasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>5.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with knowledge, unprompted<br>5.舍俱智相应无行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 6.舍俱智相应无行一心[<b>6.Upekkhāsahagataṃ ñāṇasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>6.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with knowledge, prompted<br>6.舍俱智相应有行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 7.舍俱智不相应无行一心[<b>7.Upekkhāsahagataṃ ñāṇavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>7.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from knowledge, unprompted<br>7.舍俱智不相应无行一心]

8欲界善心 --> 8.舍俱智不相应有行一心[<b>8.Upekkhāsahagataṃ ñāṇavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ</b><br>8.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from knowledge, prompted<br>8.舍俱智不相应有行一心]


18无因心 --> 8无因善果报心[<b>kusalavipāka-ahetukacittāni</b><br>wholesome-resultant rootless consciousness<br>无因善果报心]

18无因心 --> 7无因不善果报心[<b>akusalavipākacittāni</b><br>unwholesome-resultant consciousness<br>无因不善果报心]

18无因心 --> 3无因唯作心[<b>ahetukakiriya-cittāni</b><br>unwholesome-resultant consciousness<br>无因唯作心]

12不善心 --> 8贪根心[<b>lobhamūlacittāni - 8</b><br>consciousness rooted in greed - 8<br>贪根心 - 8]
12不善心 --> 2嗔根心[<b>dosamūlacittāni - 2</b>consciousness rooted in hatred - 2<br>嗔根心 - 2]
12不善心 --> 2痴根心[mohamūlacittāni - 2<br>consciousness rooted in delusion<br>痴根心]

15色界心 --> 5色界善心[<b>rūpāvacara-kusalacittāni - 5</b><br>fine-material-sphere wholesome consciousness - 5<br>色界善心 - 5]
 
15色界心 --> 5色界果报心[<b>rūpāvacara-vipākacittāni - 5</b><br>fine-material-sphere resultant consciousness - 5<br>色界果报心 - 5]
 
15色界心 --> 5色界唯作心[<b>rūpāvacara-kriyācittāni - 5</b><br>fine-material-sphere resultant consciousness - 5<br>色界唯作心 - 5]


12无色界心 --> 4无色界善心[<b>arūpāvacaracittāni - 4</b><br>immaterial-sphere wholesome consciousness- 4<br>无色界善心 - 4]
 
12无色界心 --> 4无色界果报心[<b>arūpāvacara-vipākacittāni - 4</b><br>immaterial-sphere resultant consciousness - 4<br>无色界果报心 - 4]
 
12无色界心 --> 4无色界唯作心[<b>arūpāvacara-kriyācittāni - 4</b><br>immaterial-sphere functional consciousness - 4<br>无色界唯作心 - 4]


8出世间心 --> 4出世间善心[<b>lokuttara-kusalacittāni - 4</b><br>supramundane wholesome consciousness - 4<br>出世间善心 - 4]

8出世间心 --> 4出世间果心[<b>Lokuttara-vipākacittāni - 4</b><br>supramundane resultant consciousness - 4<br>出世间果心 - 4]


4出世间善心 --> 入流道心[<b>Sotāpatti-maggacittaṃ</b><br>path consciousness of stream-entry<br>入流道心]
 
4出世间善心 --> 一来道心[<b>Sakadāgāmi-maggacittaṃ</b><br>path consciousness of once-returning<br>一来道心]

4出世间善心 --> 不还道心[<b>Anāgāmi-maggacittaṃ</b><br>path consciousness of non-returning<br>不还道心]
 
4出世间善心 --> 阿拉汉道心[<b>Arahatta-maggacittañ cā ti</b><br>path consciousness of arahantship<br>阿拉汉道心]


4出世间果心 --> 入流果心[<b>Sotāpatti-phalacittaṃ</b><br>fruition consciousness of stream-entry<br>入流果心]
 
4出世间果心 --> 一来果心[<b>Sakadāgāmi-phalacittaṃ</b><br>fruition consciousness of once-returning<br>一来果心]
 
4出世间果心 --> 不还果心[<b>Anāgāmi-phalacittaṃ</b><br>fruition consciousness of non-returning<br>不还果心]
 
4出世间果心 --> 阿拉汉果心[<b>Arahatta-phalacittañ cā ti</b><br>fruition-consciousness of Arahantship<br>阿拉汉果心]
  • 89 Citta (consciousness 心)
    • Lokuttara
    • lokuttara-kusalacittāni - 4
    • lokuttara-vipākacittāni - 4
    • Lokiyacitta - 81
      • kāmāvacaracittāni - 54
        • akusalacittāni - 12
          • lobhamūlacittāni - 8
          • dosamūlacittāni - 2
          • mohamūlacittāni - 2

89 Citta (consciousness 心)

Lokuttara

Supramundane
出世间

Lokuttaracittāni 8
Supramundane Consciousness 8
出世间心 8种

lokuttara-kusalacittāni - 4

Supramundane Wholesome Consciousness 4
出世间善心 4种

1.Sotāpatti-maggacittaṃ.
1.Path consciousness of stream-entry.
1.入流道心

2.Sakadāgāmi-maggacittaṃ.
2.Path consciousness of once-returning.
2.一来道心

3.Anāgāmi-maggacittaṃ.
3. Path consciousness of non-returning.
3.不还道心

4.Arahatta-maggacittañ cā ti.
4.Path consciousness of Arahantship.
4.阿拉汉道心

Imāni cattāri pi lokuttara-kusalacittāni nāma.
These are the four types of supramundane wholesome consciousness.
有4种出世间善心

Imāni: these 这些
cattāri: four 四
pi: only; just even 只有
lokuttara: supramundane 出世间心
kusalacittāni: wholesome consciousness 善心
nāma: [? certainly; truly; for sure 确定地]

lokuttara-vipākacittāni - 4

Supramundane Resultant Consciousness 4
出世间果心 4种

1.Sotāpatti-phalacittaṃ.
1.Fruition consciousness of stream-entry.
1.入流果心

2.Sakadāgāmi-phalacittaṃ
2.Fruition consciousness of once-returning.
2.一来果心

3.Anāgāmi-phalacittaṃ
3.Fruition consciousness of non-returning.
3.不还果心

4.Arahatta-phalacittañ cā ti
4.Fruition-consciousness of Arahantship.
4.阿拉汉果心

Lokiyacitta - 81

Mundane Consciousness 81
世间心 81种

kāmāvacaracittāni - 54

Sense-Sphere Consciousness 54
欲界心 54种

akusalacittāni - 12

Unwholesome Consciousness 12
12 不善心

lobhamūlacittāni - 8

Consciousness rooted in greed
贪根心

1. Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
1.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with wrong view, unprompted.
1.一心，伴随着喜悦，与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

2.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
2. One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with wrong view, prompted.
2.一心，伴随着喜悦，与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam: prompted 被鼓励的

3.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
3. One consciousness, accompanied by joy, dissociated from wrong view, unprompted.
3.一心，伴随着喜悦，不与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatavippayutta: disassociated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

4.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
4.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, dissociated from wrong view, prompted.
4.一心，伴随着喜悦，不与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam: prompted 被鼓励的

5.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
5. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with wrong view, unprompted.
5.一 心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Upekkhāsahaga: accompanied by equanimity 伴随着镇静
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

6.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
6.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with wrong view, prompted.
6.一 心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Upekkhāsahaga: accompanied by equanimity 伴随着镇静
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam

7.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
7. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from wrong view, unprompted.
一心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解不有关联，主动的。

8.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekan'ti.
8.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from wrong view, prompted.
8.一心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解不有关联，被鼓励的。

dosamūlacittāni - 2

Consciousness rooted in hatred 2
嗔根心 2种

1. Domanassasahagataṃ paṭighasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.

  1. One consciousness, accompanied by displeasure, associated with aversion, unprompted.
    一心，伴随着不悦，与厌恶有关联，主动的。

2. Domanassasahagataṃ paṭighasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekan ti.
One consciousness, accompanied by displeasure, associated with aversion, prompted.
一心，伴随着不悦，与厌恶有关联，被鼓励的。

mohamūlacittāni - 2

Consciousness rooted in delusion 2
痴根心 2种

1.Upekkhāsahagataṃ vicikicchāsampayuttam ekaṃ.

  1. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with doubt.
    一心，伴随着镇静，与疑有关联。

2.Upekkhāsahagataṃ uddhaccasampayuttam ekan ti.
2.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with restlessness.
一心，伴随着镇静，与掉举有关联。

注：[?...] 内的内容表示存疑，通常是查不到，或者查到了但存在一词多义的情况，从中选取了自己觉得最接近的词义，但不确定一定是正确的。

item.title: Pali Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases
item.content:encoded:
• Pali: Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases
    • Dative and Gentive plurals
    • Vocabulary
      • Nouns
      • Verbs
      • Adjectives
    • Exercises
      • (a) Translate into English
      • Exercise b 英译巴

Pali: Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases

Stem (词干) Dative singular (与格单数)
muni munino, munissa (to or for the sage) sage: 哲人，智者
senānī senānino, garussa (to or for the general) general: 将军
garu garuno, garussa (to or for the preceptor)
vidū viduno, vidussa (to or for the wise man)
go gavasa, gāvassa (to or for the ox)
Stem (词干) Genitive singular (属格单数)
Buddha Buddhassa (of the Buddha, the Buddha's
muni munino, munissa (of the sage, the sage's) sage: 哲人，智者
garu garuno, garussa (of the preceptor, the preceptor's preceptor:导师
vidū viduno, vidussa (of the wise man, the wise man's)

Dative and Gentive plurals

Noun-stem Dative and Genitive plurals
Buddha Buddhānaṃ (to or for the Buddhas, of the Buddhas)
muni muninaṃ (to or for the sages, of the sages)
senānī senānīnaṃ (to or for the generals, of the generals)
garu garūnaṃ (to or for the preceptors, of the preceptors)
vidū vidūnaṃ (to or for the wise man, of the wise man)
go gavaṃ, gunnaṃ, ganaṃ (to or for the oxen, of the oxen) oxen:公牛

Vocabulary

Nouns

aggi (fire)
andhakāra (darkness)
assama (hermitage 隐居处，修道院)
bhūpa (king)
tāpasa (asetic 苦行者)
kāru (carpenter 木工，木匠)
pāsāda (palace 宫殿)
ari (enemy)
pabbata (mountain)
raja-purisa (policeman)
āloka (light 光）
yācaka (beggar 乞丐，叫花子)
amacca (minister 部长，大臣, companion 旅伴，伙伴）
tattha eva (there itself), ind.
(Ind. indenpendent)

Verbs

abhiruhati (climbs up)
pp. abhirūḷha

oruhati (climbs down)
pp. orūḷha

khādati (eats)
pp. khādita

Adjectives

bahu (many);
abhinava (quite new);
nava (new)

Exercises

(a) Translate into English

1.Aggi uṭṭhāya kuṭumbikassa gehaṃ ḍahi.
Fire rose up and burnt the householder's house.
火燃起来了并且烧掉了屋主的房子。

Aggi:fire 火
uṭṭhāya: having risen 已生起
kuṭumbikassa:? family
gehaṃ: a house 一个房子
ḍahi: burnt 烧

2.Mayaṃ ajja isino assamaṃ pabbataṃ abhiruhissāma.
We will today climb up the mountain to see the seer's hermitage.
我们今天将会爬上山去看先知的隐居处。

Mayaṃ: we 我们
ajja: today 今天
isino: seer, sage 先知, 智者
assamaṃ: monastery, hermitage 寺院，修道院
pabbataṃ: mountain; hill 山；山丘，小山

3.Navo setu kārunā kato hoti.
The new bridge has been built by the carpenter.
新的桥已经被木匠建起来了。

Navo: new, fresh 新的，新鲜的
setu: bridge 桥
kārunā: ?
kato: make, built 做，修建
hoti: is, becomes 是，成为

4.Gahapatino gāvo corehi hatā.
The householder's oxen were taken away by thieves.
屋主的牛被贼牵走了。

Gahapatino: householder 屋主
gāvo: cow, cattle 牛
corehi: thief, robber 贼，强盗
hatā: ?

5.Gahapatino ucchavo dhanikena vāṇijena kītā.
The bouscbojder's sugar cane were bought by the rich merchant.
屋主的甘蔗被富有的商人带走了。

Gahapatino: householder 屋主
ucchavo: sugar cane 甘蔗
dhanikena: wealthy man 富有的人
vāṇijena: trader, dealer 交易商，贸易商
kītā: bought, purchased 买，购买

6. Sabbaññunā desito dhammo vihāraṃ gatehi senānino puttehi suto.
The Dhamma expounded by the Omniscient One was heard (listened to) by the general's sons who had gone to monastery.
一切知者所宣说的法，被到寺院的将军的儿子们所听到。

Sabbaññunā: omniscient; all knowing; with complete understanding 一切知者
desito: preached (by); taught (by); explained (by); instructed (by) 被教导;被解释
dhammo: nature, character 自性，法
vihāraṃ: 寺院
gatehi: gone (to), went (for) 去到
senānino: general 将军
puttehi: son, child 儿子，孩子
suto: heard, learned 听到，学到

7.Alagaddena daṭṭho migo tatth'eva patitva mato.
The deer bitten by the snake fell down and died there itself.
The deer bitten by the snake fell down and died there itself.
被蛇咬伤的鹿倒地而死。

Alagaddena: water-snake; poisonous snake 水蛇；毒蛇
daṭṭho: bitten 被咬
migo: deer 鹿
tatth'eva: right there; in that place; on the spot; there and then 就在那
patitvā: having fallen down (from); having fallen off (of); having fallen (onto) 倒下
mato: dead 死

8.Sūdehi gahapatino sevakānaṃ odano pacito.
The rice was cooked by the cooks for the householder's servants.
米饭是由厨师为户主的仆人煮的。

Sūdehi: cook; chef 厨师
gahapatino: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
sevakānaṃ: servant, attendant 仆人，侍者
odano: rice; boiled rice; food 米饭
pacito: cooked 煮的

9.Suriyassa ālokena andhakāro apagato.
The darkness was dispelled (or was gone off) by the sun's light.
黑暗被阳光驱散（或消失）。

Suriyassa: sun; lit. shining 太阳
ālokena: light; brightness 光
andhakāro: darkness; blackness; blindness 黑暗
apagato: without; free (from); with no 驱散

10.Bhūpassa ca kumārānaṃ ca amaccānaṃ ca bahavo abhinavā pāsādā kārūhi katā.
Many new palaces have been built by the carpenters for the King, the princes and ministers.
许多新宫殿已经被木匠为国王、王子和大臣建立起来。

Bhūpassa:
ca: and, both 和
kumārānaṃ: prince 王子
amaccānaṃ: minister 部长；大臣
bahavo: many; much; lots (of) 许多
abhinavā: brand new; fresh 新的
pāsādā: palace 宫殿
kārūhi: did, made 做
katā: done; did; completed 完成

Exercise b 英译巴

1.The ox beaten with a bamboo by the householder's servant ran away.
牛被户主的仆人用竹子打后逃跑了
Go gahapatino sevakena veḷunā pahaṭo apadhāvi.

Go: cow; cattle 牛
gahapatino: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
sevakena: servant, attendant 仆人；侍者
veḷunā: bamboo 竹子
pahaṭo: hit; struck 打；击打
apadhāvi: ?

2.The asetic climbed down (from) the mountain and entered the village for alms.
苦行者从山上下来，进村乞食。
Tāpaso (isi) pabbatamhā orūḷho gāmam pindāya paviṭṭho.

Tāpaso: ascetic; hermit 苦行者，隐士
isi: seer; sage 哲人；智者
pabbatamhā: mountain; hill 山；山丘
orūḷho: descended, climbed down 下来
gāmam: ?
pindāya: ?
paviṭṭho: entered; gone (into) 进入

3.The man having seen the thief that entered the house, went and brought the policeman
那人看到小偷进了屋子，就去把警察带来了。
Puriso gehaṃ paviṭṭhaṃ coraṃ disvā gantvā rājapurise ānesi.

Puriso: man; person 男子；人
gehaṃ: house; dwelling 房子；居住
paviṭṭhaṃ: entered; gone (into) 进入
coraṃ: thief; robber 小偷; 盗贼
disvā: having seen; having understood; having found out 看到
gantvā: having gone (to); having travelled (to) 去到
rājapurise: king’s man; royal servant; police officer 警察
ānesi: brought; took 被带走

4.The householder saw (his) son, fallen from the tree and died, and wept.
户主看见儿子从树上掉下来死了，哭了。
Gahapati rukkhato (rukkhamhā) patitaṃ mataṃ puttaṃ disvā rodi.

Gahapati: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
rukkhato: tree 树
rukkhamhā: tree 树
patitaṃ: fallen (onto); landed (on) 掉落（在...上）
mataṃ: dead 死
puttaṃ: son; child 儿子；孩子
disvā: having seen; having understood; having found 看到
rodi:cried, lamented 哭泣

5.The house bought by the mercant was burnt by his enemies.
商人买的房子被敌人烧毁了。
Vāṇijena kīto geho arīhi daḍḍho.

Vāṇijena: trader; dealer 交易商；贸易商
kīto: bought; purchased; paid for 买了的
geho: house; dwelling 房子；住宅
arīhi: enemy 敌人
daḍḍho: burnt; burnt down; consumed by fire 烧，烧掉，被火摧毁

6.Men go to heaven by means of Dhamma.
人们通过佛法进入天界。
Manussā dhammena saggaṃ

Manussā: human being; man; person 人类，人，人们
dhammena: 佛法
saggaṃ: heaven; paradise 天界；天国

7.Even the heroes were attacked by death.
就连英雄也遭到了死亡的袭击。
Vīrāpi maccunā pahaṭā.

Vīrāpi: ?
maccunā: death 死亡
pahaṭā: hit; struck 打，撞击；打击

8.Alas, the world will perish!
唉，世界就要灭亡了！
Nassati vata loko!

Nassati: perishes; ends; is destroyed; 灭亡；毁灭
vata: oh!; oh no!; oh dear!; wow! （感叹词）唉
loko: world; plane of existence 世界

9.Rice cooked by the cook was eaten by the beggar's dog.
厨师煮的饭被乞丐的狗吃掉了。
Sūdena pacito odano yācakassa sunakhena khādito.

Sūdena: cook; chef 厨师
pacito: cooked 煮的
odano: rice; boiled rice; food; 米饭；煮熟的米饭
yācakassa: beggar; mendicant 乞丐
sunakhena: dog 狗
khādito: eaten; consumed 吃掉

10.The man's oxen were lost (vanihshed).
该男子的牛丢失了（消失）。
Purisassa goṇo naṭṭho.

Purisassa: man; person 男子，人
goṇo: ox; bull 牛，公牛
naṭṭho: lost; perished; destroyed 丢失，丧失

item.title: Pali Lesson 15 excrise 第15课课后作业题
item.content:encoded:
Lesson 15 Excrise 第15课 练习

巴译英：

Exercise a:
1.Ahaṃ hiyyo gāmamhā idhāgato.
I came here yesterday from the village.
我昨天从村庄来到这里。

2.Puriso rukkhamhā patitvā mataṃ puttaṃ disvā rodi.
The man wept after seeing the son that fell from the tree and died.
在看到儿子从树上摔下死亡之后，那个男子悲伤哭泣。

3.Senāpatinā arihi muñcitaṃ bhātikaṃ disvā gahapati ativa tuṭṭho ahosi.
The householder saw the brother saved from enemies by the general and became extremely happy.
屋主看到弟弟被将军从敌人手中解救出来，非常高兴。

  1. Suriyo uggato hoti, tumhe pana idāni pi sayatha.
    The sun has risen, but you are still lying down (lit. even now).
    太阳已经升起，但你还躺着（现在也是）。

  2. Therena anusiṭṭā manussā pāṇātipātā viratā ahesuṃ.
    The men advised by the Thera abstained from killing.
    这些人在长老的建议下放弃杀生。

  3. Te dhammaṃ caritvā saggaṃ gatā.
    They practised the Dhamma and went to heaven.
    他们修习佛法，去到了天界。

  4. Kuhiṃ ṭhito tvaṃ gehaṃ coraṃ passi?
    Where did you stand and see the thief that came to the house?
    你站在哪里看到贼去屋子里的？

  5. Patto hathamhā patiso bhinno ahosi.
    The bowl fell from the hand and was broken.
    钵从手上掉下来摔破了。

  6. Senāninā asinā pahaṭa arayo patitā matā.
    The enemies attacked by the general with (his) sword fell down dead.
    被将军攻击的敌人带着（他的）剑倒地身亡。

  7. Buddho bhikkhāhi ca upāsakehi ca vandito pūjito ca āsi.
    The Buddha was adored and honoured by monks and lay devotees.
    佛陀被出家众和在家信徒喜爱和尊敬。

Exercise b:
1.The rice cooked by the cook was eaten by the servants.
厨师做的饭被服务员吃了。
Sūdena pacito odano sevakehi bhutto.

2.We saw fallen tree.
我们看到倒下的树。
Mayaṃ patitaṃ rukkhaṃ passimhā.

3.Where is the man that has came here?
来这里的那个男人在哪？
Idāni āgato puriso kuhiṃ hoti?

4.The boy ran from here and/fell down there.
男孩从这里跑过来并摔倒在那边。
Dārako ito dhāvitvā tatra patito.

5.Kuto so āgato?
Where has he come from?
他从哪里来？

  1. I saw a deer that had been bitten by a snake and had died.
    我看到一只鹿被蛇咬了然后死了。
    Ahaṃ ahinā daṭṭhaṃ mataṃ migaṃ passiṃ.

7.The man seeing (having seen) his son returned from the village became happy
(glad).
那个男子看到他的儿子从村子回来变得高兴。
Puriso gāmamhā (gāmato) gehamāgataṃ puttaṃ disvā tuṭṭho ahosi.

8.The house built by the carpenter was bought by the house-
holder.
木匠建造的房子被户主买走了。
Kārunā kato geho gahapatinā kīto.

9.The trees cut by the servants fell down.
被仆人砍伐的树木倒下了。
Taravo (rukkhā) sevakehi chinnā patitā.

10.The men who went to the monastery saw the Thera and bowed down.
去到寺院的男子们看到了长老并顶礼。
Vihāraṃ gatā purisā Theraṃ disvā vandiṃsu (abhivādesisuṃ).

11.Where have those men come from?
这些男子从哪里来？
Kuto te manussā āgatā？
